articles.title: Crypto is built for AI agents, not humans, says Alchemy's CEO
articles.description: Alchemy CEO Nikil Viswanathan argues the global financial system was designed for humans, but the next wave of commerce will be driven by AI agents that operate natively in crypto.

articles.title: Trump defends crypto legislation at private event featuring boxer Mike Tyson, Tether CEO
articles.description: President Donald Trump, at a Mar-a-Lago gathering of investors in his self-branded memecoin, said crypto is mainstream and banks should back off the industry's bill.

articles.title: BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF just hit a massive milestone that proves crypto is now a mainstream bet
articles.description: IBIT options open interest topped Deribit on Friday, signaling rapid institutional adoption of regulated crypto derivatives in the U.S.

articles.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
articles.description: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

articles.title: How Anthropic’s Mythos model is forcing the crypto industry to rethink everything about security
articles.description: DeFi leaders say that AI will arm both attackers and defenders, and widen the gap between projects that prioritize security and those that do not.

articles.title: The climate tech IPO window could finally be cracking open
articles.description: Nuclear startup X-energy went public, geothermal startup Fervo is about to. Could this be the moment that climate tech investors have been waiting for?

articles.title: Bitcoin falls after Trump reportedly canceled Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner's Iran-talks trip
articles.description: Trump is expected to speak at his crypto conference in Palm Beach shortly.

articles.title: 北大西洋氣候新發現：中新世期間氣溫低於預期 9°C，挑戰傳統暖化觀點

articles.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
articles.description: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Lidl’s owner, Schwarz Group. With the blessing of their governments, the companies intend to offer a sovereign alternative to enterprises in an AI landscape dominated by American players.

articles.title: Mike Tyson, Tether CEO, Cathie Wood among speakers at Trump's 'most exclusive' crypto conference
articles.description: The event, at which Trump himself is scheduled to speak, gathers top-tier holders of the $TRUMP meme coin.

articles.title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
articles.description: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globally.

articles.title: Bitcoin at $40,000 would be 'near-unprecedented' statistical outcome, analyst says
articles.description: Mean-reversion models suggest bearish targets imply a 0.4th percentile event, far beyond typical market corrections.

articles.title: Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy
articles.description: John Ternus, Apple's incoming CEO, is a hardware guy, signaling Apple may be putting devices back at the center of its strategy.

articles.title: India’s Snabbit seeks fresh funding at a $400M valuation, sources say
articles.description: Snabbit has scaled rapidly, crossing one million jobs in March, amid growing investor interest.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: CFTC sues New York over bid to apply gambling laws to prediction markets
articles.description: The CFTC has filed suit to block New York from enforcing gambling laws on prediction platforms, arguing federal regulators have sole authority over event-based contracts.

articles.title: Europe’s banks are going all in on crypto
articles.description: Brahimi explores the impact of European banks' integration of digital assets into their existing brokerage and payments infrastructure in the wake of MiCA.

articles.title: Coinbase’s Jesse Pollak says AI agents are the next big wave for crypto payments
articles.description: Pollak, who will be speaking at Consensus Miami 2026 next month, also sees the open-source protocol x402 as a key part of that wave.

articles.title: Bitcoin traders eye $73K next as weekly trend line holds price hostage
articles.description: Bitcoin market participants favored a short-term return to $73,000 as resistance stayed in place, with some analysis seeing even lower levels.
